series_metadata.series_description: To record all property or persons released or received. (HP-60)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: White Copy - This form is attached another report such as an OH-1, case investigation, HP-7, HP-25A, etc. and assunes this record''''s retention period. Pink Copy - Given individual whom property or person is released or received. Yellow Copy - Retained in receipt book last receipt has been used
